title: [InstCombine] Canonicalize Bit Testing by Shifting to Sign Bit

tests.outside_scope_reason: This tests the edge case where Y is a constant 0, making the sub result in (bw-1) directly. While the pattern matching would handle this, none of the existing known tests demonstrate Y being a compile-time constant zero versus a variable.

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i1 @test_y_zero_edge_case(i32 %a) {
  %shl.mask = and i32 %a, 1
  %cmp = icmp ne i32 %shl.mask, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @test_y_zero_edge_case(i32 %a) {
#0:

  %shl = shl i32 %a, %sub
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %shl, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
